# Fratelli Remodel

> Premier residential remodeling contractor serving Las Vegas, Nevada and surrounding areas. Specializing in kitchen remodels, bathroom remodels, full home renovations, and custom interior upgrades. Family-owned and operated by brothers John and Joe Juadines.

## Business Overview

- **Business Name:** Fratelli Remodel
- **Type:** Residential Remodeling Contractor
- **Location:** Las Vegas, Nevada (serving the greater Las Vegas Valley)
- **Service Area:** Las Vegas, Henderson, Summerlin, North Las Vegas, Paradise, Spring Valley, Enterprise, NV
- **Founded by:** John Juadines and Joe Juadines
- **Contact:** fratelliremodel@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://fratelliremodel.com
- **Google Rating:** 5.0 stars (verified Google reviews)
- **Instagram:** @fratelliremodel

## Services

### Kitchen Remodeling — Las Vegas
Full kitchen renovations including custom cabinetry, countertop installation (quartz, granite, marble), tile backsplashes, flooring, lighting, and appliance integration. From complete gut-and-rebuild to cosmetic refreshes.

### Bathroom Remodeling — Las Vegas
Custom bathroom renovations including walk-in showers, freestanding tubs, tile work, vanities, fixtures, and full layout redesigns. Expertise in luxury finishes including brushed gold, matte black, and polished chrome hardware.

### Full Home Remodeling — Las Vegas
Comprehensive whole-home renovations coordinating all trades — demo, framing, plumbing, electrical, tile, flooring, painting, and finish work — under one roof.

### Flooring Installation — Las Vegas
Tile, hardwood, LVP (luxury vinyl plank), and natural stone flooring installation for kitchens, bathrooms, living areas, and whole homes.

### Custom Tile Work — Las Vegas
Specialty tile installation including large-format tile, shower surrounds, feature walls, herringbone patterns, and natural stone.

## Why Homeowners Choose Fratelli Remodel

- **Family-owned:** John and Joe are hands-on throughout every project — not just salespeople
- **Single point of contact:** No subcontractor runaround; direct communication from start to finish
- **Transparent process:** Clear timelines, honest pricing, no surprise costs
- **Las Vegas specialists:** Deep knowledge of local permitting, climate considerations, and design trends
- **5-star rated:** Verified Google reviews from real Las Vegas homeowners
- **Attention to detail:** Craftsmanship-first approach on every project, regardless of size

## Completed Projects

### Kristen's Full Home Remodel — Las Vegas, NV
Complete whole-home renovation including full kitchen remodel, master bathroom remodel, guest bathroom remodel, and new flooring throughout. Custom cabinetry, quartz countertops, tile showers, and luxury finishes.

### Lisa's Kitchen and Bathroom Remodel — Las Vegas, NV
Full kitchen renovation with new cabinetry, countertops, and backsplash. Master bathroom remodel with custom tile shower and modern fixtures.

### Additional Projects
Custom kitchen remodels, bathroom renovations, and full home updates throughout the Las Vegas Valley for residential clients.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How long does a kitchen remodel take in Las Vegas?**
A typical kitchen remodel takes 3–6 weeks depending on scope. Full gut-and-rebuild projects may take longer. Fratelli Remodel provides a clear timeline before any work begins.

**How long does a bathroom remodel take in Las Vegas?**
Most bathroom remodels are completed in 2–4 weeks. Custom tile work and specialty fixtures may extend the timeline slightly.

**Do you handle permits for remodeling in Las Vegas?**
Yes. Fratelli Remodel handles all necessary permits required by Clark County and the City of Las Vegas for residential remodeling projects.

**What areas do you serve in Las Vegas?**
We serve all of the greater Las Vegas Valley including Las Vegas, Henderson, Summerlin, North Las Vegas, Centennial Hills, Green Valley, Anthem, and surrounding communities.

**How do I get a quote for my remodel?**
Contact us through the form at https://fratelliremodel.com or email fratelliremodel@gmail.com. We offer free consultations and estimates.

**Are you licensed and insured in Nevada?**
Yes. Fratelli Remodel is a licensed and insured contractor operating in the state of Nevada.
